ops.text: A4 COMPLETE — 12/12 fleet repos landed + validated on plugin-autobump @plugin-v1. Cross-repo bug found live and fixed twice: github.job_workflow_sha AND job_workflow_ref both arrive empty on cross-repo reusable-workflow calls; final design is deterministic (same-repo → github.sha, cross-repo → script-ref input default plugin-v1; tag moved to 19995aad then later commits). Bump lanes armed (push+weekly strict) and day-one drift self-healed by real bot bumps: getaway 1.1.1, cc-transcript 0.2.1, slop-cop 0.1.3, athome 0.1.1, wlm 0.1.1, cli-demo 0.1.2, repo-bootstrap 0.61.3 (dogfood: my own unbumped template push auto-bumped seconds later). Guard lanes validated (cc-context + captain-hook guarded-drift warn; cc-review + cc-present clean; cc-runtime guarded, dispatch-only pending owner); arm-guards agent arming the 4 validated ones. write-like-me + cc-runtime needed surgical single-commit rebases past foreign conflicted commits in shared working copies (jj rebase -r <stub> -d main@origin, never -b). A5 shipped: AGENTS.md plugin-versioning rule caveat (fragment+render+lock, 82e171b0) + repo-bootstrap plugin-extra template FileSpec (81d5341b). Lane-report cross-contamination gotcha: parallel lanes sharing /tmp/autobump_log.txt crossed their reported tables — verified true tables from run logs directly (cc-guides + cc-present actually clean). B3 verify + speculative fixes (PLF-04 pruner, PLF-08 assert Option A ratified) in flight.
